snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.      
 
Directed by: 
Jacob Chase  

Screenplay by:

Story by: 
David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase

Based on characters created by:

When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.

The circle of trust just got bigger. Focker-In-Law is in theaters this Thanksgiving.

This November, comedy icon and Emmy winner Ben Stiller and two-time Oscar® winner Robert De Niro reunite, joined by Grammy winner and Oscar® nominee Ariana Grande, in Focker-In-Law, a new chapter in the blockbuster Meet the Parents franchise.
 
Written and directed by John Hamburg, who co-wrote the three previous Meet the Parents films, Focker-In-Law is produced by Oscar® nominee Jane Rosenthal and Robert De Niro for Tribeca Productions; Ben Stiller and Oscar® winner John Lesher for Red Hour Films; Emmy winner Jay Roach for Delirious Media; and John Hamburg for Particular Pictures.

METRO 2039 takes you to the dark heart of the Moscow Metro where the last survivors of the nuclear apocalypse cling to existence in the tunnels and subways of the ruined city, hope is lost… the future looks bleak... if there is one.  

Sign up for the latest news delivered to your inbox so you don’t miss out on the latest METRO roundups.

snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
snippet.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song “Runway” performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as “Lily” and “Irv” from the first film. 
 
“The Devil Wears Prada 2” is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

snippet.title: ΝΙΝΟ Ξυπολιτάς x Josephine – Τι Κάνεις; | Official Music Video (4K)
snippet.description:
🔔 Κάνε ΕΓΓΡΑΦΗ στο Official κανάλι του Nino Xypolitas εδώ: http://bit.ly/Nino_Sub
📌 Βρες το «Τι Κάνεις;» εδώ: https://outnow.io/t/ti-kaneis

Στίχοι:
Τι κάνεις,
Πες μου πώς περνάς την ημέρα,
Αν υπάρχω εγώ στον αέρα,
Που αναπνέεις κάθε πρωί.

Τι κάνεις,
Πες μου πώς περνάει ο χρόνος,
Αν σου λείπω κι αν είσαι μόνος,
Πες μου ακόμα αν μ’ αγαπάς.

Τι κάνεις,
Έχω ξεχάσει εντελώς τη φωνή σου,
Κι ας ήμουν τόσα χρόνια μαζί σου,
Θα ‘θελα σήμερα να ‘σουν εδώ.

Τι κάνεις,
Δεν ξέρω τίποτα για τη ζωή σου,
Κι ας ήμουν τόσο δεμένη μαζί σου,
Θα ’θελα τόσο πολύ να σε δω.

Για ακόμα μια φορά,
Για ακόμα μια φορά,
Για ακόμα μια φορά,
Για τελευταία φορά.

Τι κάνεις,
Πες μου πώς περνάς τη ζωή σου,
Για πες μου, έχεις κάποιον μαζί σου,
Σε έχει αγαπήσει όσο εγώ.

Τι κάνεις,
Άραγε νιώθεις ακόμα για μένα,
Μετά από τόσα πολλά μπερδεμένα,
Πες μου αν σκέφτεσαι κι εσύ εμάς.

snippet.title: Axtipitos mc - Ματια μου / Matia mou (Extended Mix)
snippet.description:
Το νέο single του AXTIPITOS MC είναι εδώ!
Το «ΜΑΤΙΑ ΜΟΥ» είναι ένα συναισθηματικό αλλά και δυναμικό κομμάτι που μιλάει για τον έρωτα, την ένταση και τα βλέμματα που λένε περισσότερα από λέξεις. Με σύγχρονο ήχο και ατμοσφαιρικό vibe, το track συνδυάζει ρυθμό και συναίσθημα με τον μοναδικό χαρακτήρα του AXTIPITOS MC.

💔 Ένα τραγούδι για εκείνα τα μάτια που δεν ξεχνιούνται ποτέ…
🔥 Βάλε ένταση και νιώσε το!

⸻

🔔 Κάνε subscribe για περισσότερα tracks
👍 Like & Share αν σου άρεσε

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/axtipitos.mc/
TikTok:  https://www.tiktok.com/@axtipitos.mc

⸻

🎼 Credits:
Στίχοι: AXTIPITOS MC
Μουσική: NIKOS ZOEL

Lyrics:

(REFREN)
Μάτια μου, μέσα σου χάνομαι,  
σαν όνειρο γλυκό που δεν τελειώνει.  
Όλος ο κόσμος σ’ ένα βλέμμα σου ζει,  
κι η ψυχή μου μόνο εσένα νιώθει.

Μάτια μου, φως μου κρυφό,  
σαν ξημέρωμα μέσα στο σκοτάδι.  
Κι αν όλα γύρω χαθούν ξαφνικά,  
εσύ είσαι το δικό μου χάδι.

(KOUPLE)
Το άγγιγμά σου baby, με τρελαίνει ξανά,  
το βλεμα σου μαγεύει, με ταξιδεύει απλά.  
Μια λέξη σου αλλάζει, ό,τι φοβόμουν ,  
από σένα μάτια μου ποτέ δεν κρυβόμουν. 

Τα βράδια μου γεμάτα με εσένα ξανά,  
σαν να μην υπάρχει άλλη αγκαλιά.  
Κι αν χαθείς για λίγο απ’ τη διαδρομή,  
θα σε βρω,  και για σένα θα είμαι εκεί.

(REFREN)
Μάτια μου, μέσα σου χάνομαι,  
σαν όνειρο γλυκό που δεν τελειώνει.  
Όλος ο κόσμος σ’ ένα βλέμμα σου ζει,  
κι η ψυχή μου μόνο εσένα νιώθει.

Μάτια μου, φως μου κρυφό,  
σαν ξημέρωμα μέσα στο σκοτάδι.  
Κι αν όλα γύρω χαθούν ξαφνικά,  
εσύ είσαι το δικό μου χάδι.

(KOUPLE)
Λένε πως η αγάπη καίει σαν φωτιά,  
μα μαζί σου μοιάζουν όλα αληθινά.  
Με ανεβάζεις και χάνετε ο πόνος μου,  
Tωρα  πως να αντέξω μόνος μου .

Δεν θέλω υποσχέσεις, μόνο μια στιγμή,  
να σε έχω εδώ χωρίς «γιατί».  
Αν είναι όνειρο, μην με ξυπνάς,  
το χέρι μου κράτα, να μαγαπας.

(Bridge)
αν χαθεί ο χρόνος και όλα σβηστούν,
εσύ θα ’σαι για μένα ό,τι κι αν πουν.
Κι ό,τι κι αν μείνει απ’ αυτή την αγάπη,
θα μου θυμίζει το δικό σου χάδι.

(REFREN)
Μάτια μου, μέσα σου χάνομαι,  
σαν όνειρο γλυκό που δεν τελειώνει.  
Όλος ο κόσμος σ’ ένα βλέμμα σου ζει,  
κι η ψυχή μου μόνο εσένα νιώθει.

Μάτια μου, φως μου κρυφό,  
σαν ξημέρωμα μέσα στο σκοτάδι.  
Κι αν όλα γύρω χαθούν ξαφνικά,  
εσύ είσαι το δικό μου χάδι.

Outro  
Μάτια μου, αν χαθώ, να μην φοβηθείς,
στα όνειρα σου πάντα θα με βρεις.

snippet.title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

English Translation (shortened):

[Verse 1]
Tell me where he comes from
At last I'll know where to go
Mommy says that when you look hard
You always find something
She says he's never very far away
He leaves very often for work
Mommy says, “Working is good”
Better than being in bad company
Right?

[Pre-Chorus]
Where's your dad?
Tell me where's your dad?
Without even having to talk to him
He knows what's wrong
Oh beloved dad
Tell me where you're hiding
I must've counted my fingers
At least a thousand times (Eh)

[Chorus]
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you, where are you? Dad, where are you?

Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you, where are you? Dad, where are you?

There'll be a day we won't believe it anymore
One day or the other we'll all be dads
And from one day to the other we'll disappear

Tell us who gives birth to these irresponsible people?

snippet.title: WEST SIDE FAMILY FEAT. VESA SMOLICA - GËNJEVE
snippet.description:
Produced by: Fabrika

Directed By: Genc Osmani
Camera/D.O.P: Egon Musliu , Blacklight Media
Montazhi: Edri Jahaj
Ass Produksioni: Marlind Shijaku 
Skenografia: Lirim Lila

Music By: Alban Kondi
Lyrics by: Armir Shahini
Music Production by: Alban Kondi & Klodian Qafoku
Mix/Master by: Klodian Qafoku
Guitars by: Kevin Kaçeli

Vesa Smolica Styling by: Meriton Mullatahiri
Armir Shahini Styling by: Aisa Jahaj

Teksti:

GËNJEVE

WEST SIDE FAMILY FEAT. VESA SMOLICA

Intro Vesa 

Më the se më do sa vetë jeta
Më fole nën buzë fjalë të zbehta
Më puthje jetoje si të isha fëmijë
Gënjeve kur the si ti s’njoh njeri

Miri

Më parë bije në gjumë mbështet pas meje me orë
Tani luj ruletë mesazhet e tua zanore
Hej jam unë, si je? Përgjigje a ke?
Sot është data zero tre
A po t’bi ndër mend për ne?
Mu po m’bi n’men për ne
E mu kan mpi mendt ku je
Aty te numri vjetër kam lën një mesazh çike
Gjithë bota jemi dy, e gjithë bota jemi ne
A i niigjo mo kongët e mia?
Xhikut foli pa siklet yea
Te thashë një herë më vjen mirë vërtet për ça solle
Të thashe herën e dytë harrove ça deshe e more
Herën e tretë më the kjo nuk bën për ne
E pse e ndrrove numrin e fjalët në gryke mi le

Refren Vesa X2

Gënjeve  kur the  do të du “përgjithmonë”
E sot ja ku jemi  më the unë po shkoj
Mendove do ulem do lutem mos ik
Mi puthe ti lotët dhe më ngule një thikë

Landi

Tani eci rrugëve jam zemër pa jetë
Se ti më ke thy më ke vra më ke shkel
E sdi ku ta gjej një fjalë të më ngrohë
Të mbështes pak zemrën e prapë të jetoj
Yeeeaa

Refren Vesa X2

Gënjeve  kur the  do të du “përgjithmonë”
E sot ja ku jemi  më the unë po shkoj
Mendove do ulem do lutem mos ik
Mi puthe ti lotët dhe më ngule një thikë

Outro Landi

Më the se do jesh e do më dush sa të kesh jetë
Gënjeve e ike e thyve ktë der
Tani unë e di më dhemb por e di
Çdo fjalë “përgjithmonë” ësht veç një mashtrim
Yeeeeaaa

Refren Vesa X2

Gënjeve  kur the  do të du “përgjithmonë”
E sot ja ku jemi  më the unë po shkoj
Mendove do ulem do lutem mos ik
Mi puthe ti lotët dhe më ngule një thikë
